post_study_work_visa.name: Post-Graduation Work Permit (PGWP)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Open work permit — no employer sponsorship needed. Can work for any employer in any field.

language_requirement: English or French depending on province. IELTS/TOEFL required for international students.
scholarship_availability: Moderate — merit-based scholarships available. Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships for top candidates.
path_to_pr: Express Entry (CRS score). Canadian MBA + PGWP work experience = strong PR pathway. Typical timeline: 2-3 years after graduation.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted. Some schools waive for candidates with 5+ years experience.
